title: PlayerHP
description: Show other people's HP above their head
body:
PlayerHealth - Visual Health Management System Transform your server's health monitoring experience with an intuitive, visual approach that makes tracking player vitality effortless and engaging. ✨ Core Features Visual Heart Display System - Watch health come to life through customizable heart symbols that accurately represent each player's current status. Full hearts indicate perfect health, half hearts show partial damage, and empty hearts reveal maximum health capacity. The system automatically scales to display health values ranging from 1 HP to any custom maximum, ensuring compatibility with servers running health-modifying mechanics. Real-Time Health Monitoring - Experience seamless health tracking with live updates that respond instantly to damage, healing, regeneration, and any health modifications. The system monitors all health changes and updates displays within milliseconds, providing accurate information without lag or delay. Multi-Display Integration - Choose from multiple display methods including scoreboard integration, action bar notifications, and optional boss bar displays. Each method can be independently configured, allowing server administrators to create the perfect health visibility setup for their specific gameplay requirements. Advanced Customization Options - Personalize every aspect of the health display through comprehensive configuration options. Modify heart symbols, adjust colors using full RGB support, control update frequencies, and fine-tune performance settings to match your server's unique aesthetic and technical requirements. Performance Optimized Architecture - Built with efficiency in mind, the system includes asynchronous processing, intelligent caching mechanisms, and configurable update intervals to maintain smooth server performance even with large player counts. Memory usage remains minimal while delivering maximum functionality. Cross-Player Visibility - Enable players to monitor not only their own health but also observe other players' health status through configurable scoreboard displays. This feature proves invaluable for team-based gameplay, PvP scenarios, and cooperative adventures where health awareness is crucial. Why Choose This Solution? Seamless Integration - Installation requires no complex setup procedures or additional dependencies. Simply drop the JAR file into your plugins folder, and the system automatically generates optimized configuration files with sensible defaults that work immediately. Universal Compatibility - Designed to work flawlessly across all modern Minecraft versions while maintaining backward compatibility with older server builds. The system adapts to different health scaling systems and integrates smoothly with existing gameplay mechanics. Administrator Friendly - Comprehensive permission system allows fine-grained control over who can access different features. Reload functionality enables configuration changes without server restarts, and detailed logging helps troubleshoot any issues quickly. Resource Efficient - Unlike bulky alternatives that consume significant server resources, this lightweight solution maintains optimal performance while delivering professional-grade functionality. Memory footprint remains minimal even during peak player activity. Perfect For PvP Servers seeking enhanced combat awareness and strategic depth RPG Communities requiring immersive health visualization systems Survival Servers wanting improved player cooperation and safety awareness Mini-game Platforms needing clear health status communication Community Servers focused on enhanced player interaction and teamwork Technical Excellence The system employs modern development practices including event-driven architecture, optimized database queries, and smart caching strategies. Configuration management follows industry standards with YAML-based settings that support complex customization while remaining user-friendly for administrators of all technical levels. Installation takes less than five minutes, configuration customization can be completed in under ten minutes, and the system begins providing value immediately upon activation. Regular updates ensure continued compatibility with evolving Minecraft versions and community needs. Experience the difference that professional health management brings to your server community. Enhanced situational awareness leads to improved gameplay experiences, stronger player engagement, and more dynamic interaction between community members!
